description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

�新 Newly posted (Published: June 25, 2026)

AI summary (please check the original article for accurate details)

Minkkatsu Summer 2026 will be held on August 2, 2026 (Reiwa 8) from 10:30 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. at the Hanno Citizens Activity Center.

【Multipurpose Hall · Reservation required · Free】
• Yakult Tummy Health Class 11:00–11:40 a.m. (includes drinks)
• Tai Chi Experience 1:30–2:30 p.m.
• Seated Throat Exercises & Gentle Strength Training Experience 2:40–3:30 p.m.

Registration: Call the Citizens Activity Center (978-7551) from Friday, July 10 through Saturday, July 25. Tai Chi and throat exercise participants should bring comfortable clothes, shoes, a face towel, and a drink.

【Gallery · No reservation needed · Free】10:30 a.m.–3:30 p.m.
• Health checks and nutrition consultation (body composition scale, blood pressure measurement)
• Health checks (vegetable intake check, bone wave measurement, grip strength test)
• Food-related exhibits and workshops

【Exchange Square · No reservation needed · Materials fee required】10:30 a.m.–3:30 p.m.
• Pressed flower frames and acrylic ruler making (100–500 yen, limited quantity; free for past participants with designated course supplies)
• Blind shade-style coasters and tapestry making (100 yen, 30 minutes–1 hour)
• Eco-craft small storage box making (500 yen)
• Mottainai! Thank You—treasured secondhand items sale 10:30 a.m.–4:00 p.m. (ends when items sold out)
• Baked goods and handcrafts sale 10:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m. (ends when items sold out)

【Meeting Room · No reservation needed · Free】
• Picture Book Storytelling 11:00 a.m.–12:00 p.m., 2:00–3:00 p.m.

Related event: The 13th Foreign Residents' Japanese Speech Presentation will be held on Saturday, August 8 in the Multipurpose Hall starting at 1:30 p.m., open to all (scheduled to end by 3:30 p.m.).

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jitishinkoka/shiminkatudou/10072.html
